creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
security/p5-Net-SSLeay cores when used in conjunction with multi-threaded perl:

Bus error: 10 (core dumped)

(gdb)

The problem also exists in perl 5.8.x

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: An example perl script is attached, it connects to an LDAP repository (Active Directory) multi-threaded. If the script is either run single-threaded or without using ssl it runs fine.
